name: Half-Time Beef Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle lemon juice over apple.
2. Combine cream cheese, milk and horseradish in a bowl.
3. Stir in apple and walnut pieces.
4. Spread equal amounts of the cream cheese mixture on the cut sides of each roll.
5. Place lettuce, beef and sliced green onion on one half of each roll.
6. Cover with the top halves of the rolls.
